name: Spongiform Leukodystrophy
description: Spongiform leukodystrophy is a fatal hereditary neurological disease causing progressive degeneration of the white matter of the brain and spinal cord. It results in progressive neurological deterioration and is fatal in affected puppies.
treatment_overview: There is no treatment. Affected puppies are humanely euthanised as the condition is invariably fatal and untreatable.
prevention_tips: DNA test available for affected breeds
Test all breeding stock and avoid carrier-to-carrier matings
